goal: 修复 show 在 stale draft 存在时生命周期状态回退的问题

summary.title: Show honors terminal materialized view over stale draft
summary.what: Changed engine.Show so a local draft cache no longer masks a materialized terminal lifecycle state. Show now checks the SQLite/JSON IntentView when a draft exists and returns the view if it is merged, abandoned, superseded, or reverted. The existing status view-overrides-draft rule now uses the same terminal-status helper, and a regression test recreates a stale proposed draft next to a merged view.
summary.why: In the cxs repo, status/log/trace all reported int_4c6b94c4 as merged while mainline show returned data.intent.status=proposed because Show stopped at .ml-cache/drafts/<id>.json. Terminal states are authoritative in the materialized view; stale local drafts must not make read surfaces disagree about lifecycle status.
summary.user_goal: 修复 show 在 stale draft 存在时生命周期状态回退的问题

decisions.point: Which source wins when draft and view disagree
decisions.chose: terminal materialized view overrides local draft
decisions.rationale: Merged/abandoned/superseded/reverted are terminal states derived from synced actor-log or main-commit evidence. A local draft cannot legitimately move an intent back to proposed/drafting for a read command.

decisions.point: How broad to make the override
decisions.chose: only override for terminal view statuses
decisions.rationale: Drafting/sealed_local/proposed can still be valid local-progress states. Restricting the override preserves existing draft-first behavior for active local work while fixing stale terminal reads.

decisions.chose: keep SQLite primary-key lookup with JSON fallback
decisions.rationale: This respects the existing cache contract: SQLite and JSON paths must return the same IntentView shape; the fix changes precedence only when a terminal view exists.

rejected.alternative: Delete or rewrite stale draft files during show
rejected.reason: Show is a read command. Mutating draft cache would be broader and riskier than choosing the authoritative read source at display time.

rejected.alternative: Always prefer view over draft when both exist
rejected.reason: That would break active local draft semantics before sync/publish has produced terminal team evidence.

risks: Local full-suite runs using go test ./... and make test timed out in unrelated engine tests on this Mac; focused regression tests, cxs repro, quick-test, and go vet passed. CI may still exercise the full race/PBT path separately.

anti_patterns.what: Letting local draft files override terminal lifecycle state from the materialized view in read surfaces
anti_patterns.why: It makes commands disagree about the same intent, as seen when show reported proposed while status/log/trace reported merged.

followups: Investigate why local full PBT/race suite intermittently times out in unrelated git-heavy engine tests on this Mac.

architectural_claims: Terminal lifecycle status in the materialized IntentView is authoritative over stale local draft cache for read commands.
Show and status now share one terminal-status predicate for view-overrides-draft behavior.
behavioral_changes: mainline show returns data.view.status=merged for an intent whose materialized view is merged even if .ml-cache/drafts/<id>.json still says proposed.
Non-terminal drafts still use the existing draft-first show behavior with turns included.
